name: German Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove excess grease from bacon using paper towel.
2. Break bacon into small pieces.
3. Blend cold water and flour in a bowl.
4. Pour the mixture into a saucepan.
5. Add onion, sugar replacement, and vinegar to the saucepan.
6. Heat, stirring until thickened.
7. Add bacon and potatoes while still hot from boiling or frying.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 113
